title: Can we create a multiselect option in my custom recipe?
excerpt: I am trying to build a custom app. In which I want to add a field that can give me option to select multiple value in recipe, Its should be list or checkbox that I can be able to select(ex: list can contain sunday, monda…

posts.author: Rajeev_msquare (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to build a custom app. In which I want to add a field that can give me option to select multiple value in recipe, Its should be list or checkbox that I can be able to select(ex: list can contain sunday, monday, tuesday…),

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: @Rajeev_msquare : I may have misunderstood your request, but isn’t it what custom field types are for?

posts.author: Rajeev_msquare (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1154×366 16.5 KB

Suppose I have created this recipe and in image you can see there is an add (field) that is single select list. I want to add a multiple select list where I can select multiple option

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Rajeev_msquare,

Thanks for your suggestion. I’d like to understand your request better-- are you looking for a sublist, for example? such as a list under the “add” option?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Rajeev_msquare
Understood. Agree with you that it would be useful.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Rajeev_msquare,

I have created a request to add a custom field type “checkbox” so that you not only can use the “list” field type to select one option, but select multiple ones.

Thank you for the feedback!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
